title: selaginella stolonifera var. domingensis
intro: Selaginella stolonifera var. domingensis, also known as resurrection fern, is a unique species of spore-producing plant that is able to survive in a desiccated state and rapidly regrow when exposed to water. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its potential to lower blood pressure and inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Selaginella stolonifera var. domingensis include its ability to act as an antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial agent, which can help to protect against cell damage, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal dosage.
